note: You can list hundreds of 5-star reviews here (curated by hand or merged with API output). The home page shows a random subset on each refresh; see preview/google-reviews.js. Places API only returns a few reviews—run scripts/fetch_google_reviews.py for a starter file, then append more objects to "reviews" as needed.

reviews.text: Run the fetch script to pull real Google reviews. This placeholder stays until you connect the Places API.
